title: 'They'll fix the building, but not our souls': Sleepy Kyiv neighbourhood hit in Russian strike
description: Scenes of devastation greet residents emerging from underground shelters after a major Russian attack.
content:
Ukrainians knew a huge strike was coming. Since Russia threatened to step up attacks on the capital, Kyiv, about a week ago, many spent nights in underground shelters.
We were two floors underground, and yet we could feel and hear the massive explosi... [3052 chars]

title: Starmer uses disappearing messages on his phone, No 10 confirms
description: A batch of messages between ministers and Lord Mandelson were published on Monday - but there were only a few from the prime minister.
content:
Downing Street has confirmed that the prime minister uses an auto delete function on his phone meaning his WhatsApp messages with and about Lord Mandelson may have been lost.
Earlier this year, MPs voted to force the government to publish all documen... [2621 chars]

title: Ukraine’s Kostyuk blasts Russia stars in French Open outburst over war
description: Ukraine’s Marta Kostyuk faces Russia’s Mirra Andreeva in semifinal after beating Elina Svitolina at Roland Garros.
content:
Marta Kostyuk accused Russian players of hiding behind silence over the war in Ukraine, saying after ⁠four years of conflict they had shown “whose side they are on”, as she reached her first Grand Slam semifinal at the French Open.
The 23-year-old be... [2455 chars]

title: ‘We want to see justice in our nation again!’ Reverend attending protest speaks out
description: A reverend has told GB News “we want to see justice in our nation again” as he attended a protest following the murder of Henry Nowak.
content:
Christopher "The Vexed Vicar" Wickland said: “I think it's important that we stand with the people and stand up for truth, righteousness and justice.
“We're getting very tired of seeing our children being sacrificed on the altars of multiculturalism ... [768 chars]

title: Tommy Robinson protests at police station after Henry Nowak bodycam released
description: Hundreds of people including Laurence Fox and Tommy Robinson have organised a protest outside Southampton police station after Henry Nowak's killer was sentenced to life in prison.
content:
Tommy Robinson supporters threw chairs, bricks and bins at police as they tried to get to the spot where Henry Nowak was handcuffed as he died in a pool of his own blood.
Despite the student’s father’s pleas that he didn’t want his teen son’s death t... [5530 chars]
